heading: Demonstration hydrogen production at existing nuclear power plants
label: 16011 Demonstration hydrogen production at existing nuclear power plants

children.heading: Demonstration projects
children.label: a Demonstration projects
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for the establishment of 2 projects in geographic areas that are regionally and climatically diverse to demonstrate the commercial production of hydrogen at existing nuclear power plants.

children.heading: Economic analysis
children.label: b Economic analysis
children.text: Prior to making an award under subsection (a), the Secretary shall determine whether the use of existing nuclear power plants is a cost-effective means of producing hydrogen.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for the purposes of carrying out this section not more than $100,000,000.
